title: Tasks Panel — Merged Directive + Action with Interactive Navigation

scope.description: Merge Action + Directive panels into a single 'Tasks' tab. Show all active directives with embedded pipeline steppers. Add interactive navigation: click project for detail, click active step for session.

dod.criterion: Watcher returns DirectiveState[] for all in_progress/awaiting_completion/reopened directives
activeDirectives field added to server types, client types, aggregator, and store

tasks.title: Rename Action tab to Tasks, merge with Directive panel

dod.criterion: Tab strip shows 'Tasks' instead of 'Action', Directive tab removed
Tasks panel shows all directives grouped: needs-action (expanded), in-progress (collapsed), recent
Each directive card embeds PipelineStepper + project cards when expanded
Session items (errors, approvals, waiting-input) still appear in correct tiers

tasks.title: Click project to show detail view

dod.criterion: Clicking a project card opens a detail view showing tasks with DOD and status
Detail view shows project context.md content if available

tasks.title: Click active pipeline step to navigate to session

dod.criterion: Active pipeline steps that have associated sessions are clickable
Clicking navigates to / focuses the relevant terminal session
